method: Verify that the interface honours the prefers-reduced-motion setting by removing or reducing non-essential animation, and that any moving or auto-updating content can be paused, stopped or hidden (WCAG 2.2.2, 2.3.3).
expected_output: Report of animations/transitions and whether each responds to prefers-reduced-motion, plus a list of auto-playing or moving content lacking pause/stop/hide controls.
